hero.title1: Discover local favorites with fast delivery

intro.subtitle: Connecting Korean customers with thousands of trusted stores across Vietnam.
intro.desc1: We provide a simple ordering experience that makes it easy to choose dishes, place orders, and track deliveries.
intro.desc2: By connecting international customers with local partners, VHAN Delivery helps stores expand their sales channels
intro.desc3: reach more Korean customers, and increase revenue effectively.

costCut.title: Optimize operating costs
costCut.desc: Lower fixed expenses with flexible service fees.

settlement.title: Same-day settlement (T+0)
settlement.desc: Receive payouts within the day to keep cash flow healthy.

fastDelivery.title: Lightning-fast delivery
fastDelivery.desc: Orders are dispatched immediately after customers confirm.

support.title: Dedicated partner support
support.desc: 24/7 assistance with training and operational guidance.

step1.title: Register and verify account
step1.desc: Enter your phone number, confirm the OTP, and create a free partner profile.

step2.title: Flexible onboarding review
step2.desc: Our specialists verify details and activate your store within 24 hours.

step3.title: Launch and start delivering
step3.desc: Configure your menu, accept the first order, and scale with VHan.

item1.title: Partner enrollment made simple
item1.desc: Step-by-step walkthrough to complete your profile and go live quickly.

item2.title: The go-to delivery app

item3.title: New support center grand opening
item3.desc: Expanding resources to assist partners in major cities.
